title: Ulyanovsk、Ulyanovsk Oblast — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Ulyanovsk、Ulyanovsk Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Ulyanovsk是Ulyanovsk Oblast的一個城市，人口約620,000。The birthplace of Vladimir Lenin, a Volga River city with a well-preserved historic center and a major aviation industry.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
